title: Retrievable permanent magnet pump
abstract: A well pumping assembly has a stator (13) mounted in a housing (33), the stator having an axially extending stator cavity (39). The stator has windings (127) that when powered create an electromagnetic field into the stator cavity. A pump (41) has a landed position within the stator cavity. The pump having a non-rotating pump portion (43) and a rotating pump portion (45). Magnets (47) mount on the rotating pump portion and impart rotation to the rotating pump portion in response to the electromagnetic field. A neck (49) on a downstream end of the pump has a running and retrieval feature (51) for engagement by a running and retrieving tool to retrieve the pump from and install the pump in the landed position.
